sticker.alt: Full sticker design: a long horizontal illustration featuring 22 coral reef creatures and features
sticker._note: referenceWidth/referenceHeight MUST match the actual pixel dimensions of full-sticker.png exactly, or every creature's position will be misaligned. Update these the moment you know the real sticker size.
